payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its authoritative-state refusal","recorded GitHub Actions run 29688588050 and job 88197179137 as diagnostic CI evidence only","confirmed the live Phase 5 verifier completed six proof groups and nineteen trust adversaries before the later Phase 7 focused gate failed","added workflow-global PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE one to the Pre-Merge environment","added exact static adversaries for missing false comment-only and job-only bytecode settings","cloned a clean isolated checkout and exercised the Phase 2-to-Phase 1 import plus Phase 7 release-proof entry point under the workflow environment","asserted the isolated checkout creates no pycache or pyc and preserves exact git status","allowed only the exact additive bytecode-boundary changeset through the Phase 3 later-phase path guard","updated US-112 diagnostic documentation and Phase 6 additive replay bindings","ran focused Pre-Merge workflow documentation Phase 3 Phase 6 and Phase 7 gates without remote mutation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["base this correction as a normal child of published f83120585fe6ec01015b3551f9b6045d4e524cfb without rewriting history","set the guard at workflow scope so every current and future Python invocation in every Pre-Merge job inherits it","make the regression use a temporary clean clone rather than deleting or normalizing files in the primary checkout","unset PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX in the regression so redirected bytecode cannot produce a false pass","preserve the successful Phase 5 evidence as diagnostic CI progress without changing Phase 6 Phase 7 platform promotion signing or Phase 8 authority"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused because the pre-existing authoritative core state is unavailable and no database was initialized","the focused matrix query could not run because harness.db is absent and no replacement was initialized","GitHub Actions run 29688588050 job 88197179137 began its Phase 7 focused gate with scripts/__pycache__/verify_v1_phase1_contracts.cpython-312.pyc and then created verify_v1_phase7_release_proof.cpython-312.pyc","the final clean-status assertion correctly rejected the new repository-local Python bytecode after Phase 5 had already passed six groups and nineteen trust adversaries"]

payload.harness_friction: The authoritative Harness epoch remains unavailable, so bootstrap and matrix queries fail closed and CLI-authored records cannot run. The correction preserves that state and supplies an additive replayable trace rather than initializing or replacing the missing database.
payload.notes: The Phase 5 live verification completed six proof groups and nineteen adversaries, but the later repository-status failure means Pre-Merge did not complete. No files were removed from the primary checkout. No push, dispatch, main mutation, tag, release, package, publish, production signing, Windows support claim, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, promotion, or Phase 8 action occurred. Duration and token estimates are unavailable.
payload.task_summary: Prevented Pre-Merge Python bytecode from changing candidate repository status
